sourceFile: PrusaResearch.ini, BambuStudio BBL profiles, CrealityPrint Creality profiles
attribution: Printer and filament defaults are seeded from Prusa Research's official PrusaSlicer configuration bundle, Bambu Lab's official BambuStudio configuration bundle, and Creality's official CrealityPrint configuration bundle (all AGPLv3). See docs/licensing/THIRD_PARTY_PRUSASLICER.md, docs/licensing/THIRD_PARTY_BAMBUSTUDIO.md, and docs/licensing/THIRD_PARTY_CREALITYPRINT.md.
